{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231642448255D29706055BD990B5"}"},"total":1332},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605036716940018494","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这版唐僧角度清明，且很是主力，也没伪善，只能说也确实是有能力。作者写法是下了功夫的，查阅资料也繁杂，但能让人看得很舒服
已经超过其他99.8%的同人了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770687809,"group_id":"7597386306053753918","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"攻击性强，勿碰（或许我高看了这里…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N28By0DM7a1NYdRW/4nnpHw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e1e6dc77cdc2451d8cfb31545fd99442~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795779&x-signature=Y7%2BftagYE5X%2Frfb1FWNZD9%2FNgvc%3D","user_id":"102530554122","user_name":"梁魄墨玄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102530554122","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597386306053753918","book_info":{"abstract":"【又名：取经？我已经去过一次了！】
【类型】：西游/历史玄奘/重走西游/佛修/非洪荒/仅有大劫设定/无阴谋流。
      观音菩萨最近很头疼。
　　西游量劫将起，佛祖要他寻取经人来西天取经，本来一切已经安排好
　　可这取经人，好像有点不对劲？
　　观音：“这袈裟穿了不堕地狱。”
　　玄奘：“若穿件衣服就能如此，那世间修行岂不成了笑话？”
　　观音：“大乘佛法在西天，能消灾解难，度尽世人，等人来取。”
　　玄奘：“既然有如此妙法，为何不自己送来？这是慈悲还是傲慢？”
　　观音：“……”
　　当圆寂后的历史真玄奘，魂穿进《西游记》的世界——
　　看着脑海中那个窝囊、怯懦、是非不分、动辄落泪的取经人，他笑了。
　　让他卑躬屈膝？让他靠徒弟施舍保护？让他把慈悲挂在嘴边却视而不见众生疾苦？让他就这样成佛？
　　抱歉，这经，我不取；这佛，我不做；这西行路，我按我的走。
　　这一世，不是凡人求佛，而是圣僧以此身证道，去灵山问问如来，什么才是真正的“佛”。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/67df95d43655ec36680f256fb799cad5","author":"夏木山人","author_id":"","book_id":"7597386306053753918","book_name":"西游：圣僧的自我修养","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8b870","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"25.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597386465324040766","read_count":"258553","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"301545"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"132","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,西游衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9fd253a7e931b0e897256532cd5206e1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439364&x-signature=geCIsIFIQMfvA17%2FHN86%2BIRZxzI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"432533314233079","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231642448255D29706055BD990B5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":370,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5213,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":71632},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1770697465,"author_reply_time":1770697539,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614752471060726590","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看的。如果说原版的西游记给我一种“小乘佛法”渡己，那么这版同人写的更像是渡人渡己的“大乘佛法”，我现在才看三十章左右就已经开始期待后面的东西了，而且能看出来作者是用了心写了，除了有佛经引用之外还有自我感悟，看起来很温和舒服，期待完本[送心]","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":10,"text":"西游记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742553645BD990B5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614752471060726590%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227597386306053753918%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772950621,"group_id":"7597386306053753918","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"今朝有酒今朝醉，明日愁来明日愁","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N17rFMBdmLH/Ss5vw1YQihU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8a68602ba3894575be18e03fdf9bc469~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788943&x-signature=4BMS1uLiaD7TFPAelNHKdZowDXU%3D","user_id":"101420345778","user_name":"憨豆先生不憨只逗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101420345778","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家
